title: Russian-Style Buratta Pilaf
description: A creamy and flavorful pilaf dish infused with Russian spices and topped with a decadent velvety burrata.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add Russian sauerkraut and cook until slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Add pilaf rice and stir to combine with sauerkraut.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until rice is lightly toasted.
Add dill, paprika, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until rice is cooked.
Meanwhile, slice the burrata into 4 equal pieces.
To serve, place a scoop of pilaf on a plate, top with a piece of sliced burrata, and garnish with additional dill if desired.
